researchSkipReason: All deps are stock, already-pullable images (rust:1.93-slim-bookworm, debian:bookworm-slim, postgres:17-alpine, wiremock/wiremock:latest); the durable-store proof already PASSED against real Postgres live; fpa-gateway is a bin+lib crate that builds with -p. Nothing to research.

build_required.summary: smoke/run-durable-proof.sh: export DOCKER_HOST + TESTCONTAINERS_DOCKER_SOCKET_OVERRIDE from the colima context, run cargo test -p fpa-store-pg -- --ignored (already validated)
Dockerfile: multi-stage rust:1.93-slim-bookworm builder -> debian:bookworm-slim runtime; build+copy the fpa-gateway binary; run on 0.0.0.0:8088
compose.smoke.yml: built fpa-gateway (:8088) + postgres:17-alpine (FPA_PROJECT_DB_URL) + wiremock stub (3 GETs: /openapi.json, /healthz, /routes); required FPA_* env wired to the stub
Playwright HTTP smoke driving :8088 end-to-end (healthz, HS256-authed project.create/inspect/list, fabric.health, MCP tools/list+call, /agui auth gate) + a runner script/README
